subject: [PATCH v3 09/16] mm/userfaultfd: add RWP fault delivery and expose UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch adds support for read-write protection (RWP) to the userfaultfd mechanism in Linux. It introduces a new RWP-protected PTE type and modifies fault handling code to deliver UFFD_PAGEFAULT_FLAG_RWP messages when an RWP fault occurs. The patch also exposes the UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP ioctl, which allows userspace to register for RWP faults. The changes are designed to work with anonymous, shmem, and hugetlb memory types. The patch aims to improve the handling of read-write protection in userfaultfd by providing a more robust and efficient mechanism for delivering RWP faults to userspace.
